query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(aguardando_28d) as com_28d,
  COUNT(aguardando_60d) as com_60d,
  COUNT(aguardando_90d) as com_90d,
  COUNT(central) as com_central,
  COUNT(especialidade) as com_especialidade
FROM regulacao_data;

SELECT central, especialidade, aguardando_28d, aguardando_60d, aguardando_90d 
FROM regulacao_data 
LIMIT 5;
